title: StageExecutor.Execute: force a commit for --unsetenv, too
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

When we don't have any instructions to process, but we do have an unsetEnv or unsetLabel list, force a commit, like we already did if we were passed an out-of-band labels or annotations list, or if we were squashing, and now also do so if we're doing a confidential workload.

#### How to verify it

Extended integration tests!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
`buildah build`ing a Containerfile with no instructions, with either `--unsetenv` or `--unsetlabel` specified on the command line, now correctly generates a new image.
```
